examples: When the winter winds blow, some of us would rather hibernate than work out.
My current pet name for her is "bear" because she has to hibernate every night.
Unlike squirrels, woodchucks, and many other woodland animals, bears do not actually hibernate.
These intrepid creatures live at high altitudes and do not hibernate in the winter.
So, hibernate is more power saving, but resume from it takes something like 8-10 seconds.
